en.extract:
Mayr's forest rail (Rallicula mayri), also Mayr's forest crake, is a species of bird in the family Sarothruridae.
It is found in northern New Guinea.

External links

'''Mayr's forest rail''' ('''''Rallicula mayri'''''), also '''Mayr's forest crake''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Sarothruridae]].
It is found in northern [[New Guinea]].
